title: paspalum maritimum
intro: Paspalum maritimum, also known as sea grass or salt grass, is a type of coastal grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Paspalum maritimum is often used in the form of infusions, teas, or tinctures, which can be applied topically to treat skin conditions or ingested to promote overall well-being.
